ddls:
CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the review */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game being reviewed */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the review */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score given by the user (e.g., 1 to 5 stars) */,
  "thumbs_up_count" INTEGER /* Number of thumbs up received for the review */,
  "review_created_version" TEXT /* Version of the game during the review submission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the review was created */,
  "edited_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the review was last edited */,
  "reply_content" TEXT /* Content of the reply from the developer */,
  "replied_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the developer replied */,
  "screenshot_urls" TEXT /* List of URLs for screenshots attached to the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_name" TEXT /* Name of the game */,
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the developer or publisher */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the game */,
  "latest_version" TEXT /* Latest version number of the game */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the game */,
  "rating" REAL /* Overall rating of the game */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "profile_image" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile image */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  "last_active" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was last active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version record */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game to which this version belongs */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the game */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of this version */,
  "change_log" TEXT /* Brief description of changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the feedback category (e.g., Gameplay, Bugs) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category, if any */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_categories" (
  "review_id" TEXT /* ID of the review that is categorized */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category assigned to the review */,
  "assigned_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user or developer who assigned the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reply_logs" (
  "reply_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reply log */,
  "review_id" TEXT /* ID of the review being replied to */,
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the developer responding */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the reply */,
  "reply_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the reply was made */,
  "reply_status" TEXT /* Status of the reply (e.g., pending, sent, read) */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* ID of the developer assigned to respond */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reply_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reply_logs_developer_id FOREIGN KEY ("developer_id") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reply_logs_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "developers" (
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each developer */,
  "developer_name" TEXT /* Name of the developer or company */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the developer */,
  "company_website" TEXT /* Website of the developer or company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("developer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game related to the analytics */,
  "average_score" REAL /* Average score from users' reviews */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* Total number of reviews for the game */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the analytics were recorded */,
  "trend" TEXT /* Trend of the review scores over time (e.g., increasing, decreasing, stable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)
